## Industrial scenario

What manufacturing, edge monitoring, operations, or industrial workflow should this support?

## Adapter or protocol

- [ ] MQTT
- [ ] Modbus
- [ ] OPC UA
- [ ] MES/ERP
- [ ] PLC-specific
- [ ] Other

## Reuse boundary

- [ ] Reusable infrastructure
- [ ] Protocol adapter
- [ ] Example or sample
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Product/customer-specific workflow

If this is product/customer-specific, describe what should stay downstream instead of entering OpenClaw.NET.

## Vendor neutrality

Does this introduce a vendor-specific default, proprietary dependency, or customer-specific workflow?

## Proposed shape

Where should this live: core, gateway, optional extension, separate package, docs, sample, or downstream product?

## Notes

If this directly supports a company, customer, or downstream commercial product use case, disclose that context here.
